leaf.title: Document temperature arguments in convert help output
leaf.content:
Confirmed finding: the convert subcommand's help text predates the temperature domain — usage string and examples omit it.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_cli.py

Acceptance criteria:
- `unitconv convert --help` names temperature units C, F, K with one example
- help-text assertion added so usage cannot drift silently

Test expectations: help-output assertion in tests/test_cli.py
